comments.text_raw: एक निवेदन है कि गोरखपुर रेलवे स्टेशन पर लगभग हर कैंटीन शाप पर अंडा बिक रहा है जो ये सब नहीं खाते उनके लिए मुश्किल हो रहा है ऊपर से स्टेशन से बाहर निकलते ही मांसाहार की दुकानें इतनी ज्यादा हैं कि शुद्ध शाकाहारी होटल ढूंढने पर भी नहीं मिलते जल्दी। अंडा मांस मछली इनकी एक जगह निश्चित की जाए जिनको खाना है वहां जाकर खा ले हर जगह नहीं होना चाहिए।

comments.video_title: धरोहर, कला एवं संस्कृति को समर्पित गोरखपुर महोत्सव
comments.author: @Lorentz-z8d
comments.text_raw:
Oh really, the one who says, his  wife is his sister, what do you call it. Is it a slang??? If you know, you know.

He says Don't build Temple but he never says a word on the construction of masjid, when will you realize, he just plays victim card, rise above your surname. Don't support someone just because he shares same surname. Support on the personality. 

A time was in past, when Keshari said, Ravi kishan ji, Manoj Tiwari ji, Nirahuwa (Dinesh lal Yadav ji) were his father, now he scolds and demean them. 
He is yadmulla, so please don't support idiots.
